mapper.insert: insert into `reply` (user_id, introduction_id, content, time, type) values(#{userId}, #{introductionId}, #{content}, #{time}, #{type})
mapper.select: select r.id, r.user_id, r.introduction_id, r.content, r.time, r.type, COALESCE(u.name, a.name) as userName, COALESCE(u.avatar, a.avatar) as userAvatar from `reply` r left join `user` u on r.user_id = u.id left join `admin` a on r.user_id = a.id where r.introduction_id = #{introductionId} order by r.time desc

select r.id, r.user_id, r.introduction_id, r.content, r.time, r.type, COALESCE(u.name, a.name) as userName, COALESCE(u.avatar, a.avatar) as userAvatar from `reply` r left join `user` u on r.user_id = u.id left join `admin` a on r.user_id = a.id where r.introduction_id = #{newsId} and r.type = 'news' order by r.time desc

select r.id, r.user_id, r.introduction_id, r.content, r.time, r.type, COALESCE(u.name, a.name) as userName, COALESCE(u.avatar, a.avatar) as userAvatar from `reply` r left join `user` u on r.user_id = u.id left join `admin` a on r.user_id = a.id where r.introduction_id = #{postId} and r.type = 'post' order by r.time desc

select r.id, r.user_id, r.introduction_id, r.content, r.time, r.type, COALESCE(u.name, a.name) as userName, COALESCE(u.avatar, a.avatar) as userAvatar from `reply` r left join `user` u on r.user_id = u.id left join `admin` a on r.user_id = a.id where r.introduction_id = #{articleId} and r.type = 'article' order by r.time desc
